info.title: Tripwire Server SDK API
info.description: Customer-facing server-side Tripwire APIs for the public SDK surface.

tags.name: Gate
tags.description: Registry, organization-owned services, signup sessions, agent tokens, and dashboard login sessions.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Manage webhook endpoints, subscriptions, and outgoing event delivery.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Inspect organization events and their webhook delivery attempts.

parameters.description: Only return events of this type.

delete.summary: Disable a Gate service for the authenticated organization
delete.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:services:manage scope. This is a soft delete that sets status=disabled.

post.summary: Consume a Gate dashboard login code
post.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer sk_* with the gate:login_sessions:consume scope.

403.description: Secret key required or insufficient scope.

410.description: Login code expired or already consumed.

scopes.description: Required for secret keys. Provide at least one supported secret-key scope, or ["*"] for all current and future scopes. Omit for publishable keys.

GateServiceId.description: Canonical Gate service slug used by the public registry and by npx signup <service>. Lowercase letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores only; must start and end with a letter or number.

scopes.description: When updating a secret key, provide at least one supported secret-key scope, or ["*"] for all current and future scopes.

UpdateGateServiceRequest.description: Partial Gate service update. Nested objects and arrays replace the existing value wholesale.

UpdateWebhookEndpointRequest.description: Partial webhook endpoint update. Updating event_types replaces the endpoint subscriptions.

BearerAuth.description: Send Authorization: Bearer <token>. Gate business endpoints require sk_* secret keys. Gate workflow endpoints use gate-native bearer tokens such as gtpoll_* or agt_* where documented.

post.description: Tripwire sends a signed unified webhook envelope. Verify X-Tripwire-Timestamp and X-Tripwire-Signature against the raw request body using the endpoint signing secret.

parameters.name: X-Tripwire-Timestamp
parameters.description: Unix timestamp used in the webhook signature base string.

429.description: Rate limited. Respect Retry-After before retrying the webhook.

post.description: Tripwire sends a signed unified webhook envelope. Verify X-Tripwire-Timestamp and X-Tripwire-Signature against the raw request body using the endpoint signing secret.

parameters.name: X-Tripwire-Timestamp
parameters.description: Unix timestamp used in the webhook signature base string.

post.description: Tripwire sends a signed unified webhook envelope. Verify X-Tripwire-Timestamp and X-Tripwire-Signature against the raw request body using the endpoint signing secret.
